name: reposeiri
description: Codex adapter for bounded RepoSeiri audit queries, existing-target-only dry-run plans, and draft PR bodies.

interface.shortDescription: Review repository organization through typed RepoSeiri queries.
interface.longDescription: RepoSeiri uses one source-bound canonical Rust analysis and ten bounded queries to inspect repository routes, evidence, governance, existing-target-only dry-run patch plans, and draft PR bodies without reproducing decisions in the plugin or granting write and GitHub authority.
defaultPrompt: Show safe and blocked repo fixes.
